final:
// // This module is designed to decrement a 4-bit binary counter on each positive edge of the clock signal. When the reset input is activated (low), the counter resets its value to zero. Otherwise, the counter continuously subtracts one from its current value with each clock cycle.
module top_module(
  input clk,
  input rst,
  output reg [3:0] count
);always @(posedge clk) begin
    if(rst) begin
      count <= 4'b0;
    end
    else begin
      count <= count + 1;
    end
  end

endmodule

When the reset input is activated (low), the counter resets its value to zero. Otherwise, the counter continuously subtracts one from its current value with each clock cycle.
